name: Homemade Tahini
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sesame seeds on a baking sheet and toast them in a 350°F oven for about 20 minutes or until lightly roasted.
2. Process the toasted sesame seeds in a medium-sized food processor for 3 minutes.
3. Add 2 teaspoons of peanut oil to the food processor and process on high for 30 seconds.
4. Add 3 tablespoons of peanut oil to the food processor and continue processing until very smooth, about 2 minutes.
5. If desired, add salt to taste.
